Boutique Slow Luxury Travel · Spain

Bassa Travels is a premium Spanish boutique agency exclusively dedicated to Indonesia. We design slow luxury, private itineraries for discerning travellers — and we're looking for the right partners on the ground.

Market Context

Slow luxury travel is redefining how the world's
most discerning travellers experience the world

The luxury travel market is growing faster than ever — and a new generation of travellers is leading it. Understanding this shift explains why a partnership with Bassa Travels is a strategic opportunity — not just a commercial one.

The Strategic Connection

Spain meets Indonesia —
Bassa is the bridge

Two countries. One shared opportunity. Bassa Travels connects a high-intent, underserved Spanish traveller base with the world's most compelling slow luxury destination — creating mutual value for both sides of the equation.

What Bassa brings to Spain
A trusted expert for a complex destination — in Spanish, with cultural sensitivity and full accompaniment
Access to premium Indonesia — experiences and operators that Spanish travellers can't easily find on their own
Peace of mind — end-to-end support before, during and after the trip, available 24/7 in Spanish
Slow luxury curation — no generic packages; every trip designed around rest, renewal and authentic connection
What Bassa brings to Indonesia
Higher-ticket travellers — premium segment clients who spend more, stay longer and value quality over price
Culturally prepared visitors — briefed, respectful, and genuinely interested in local culture and nature
New Spanish-speaking market — an emerging, largely untapped segment for Indonesian tourism operators
Long-term partnership vision — stable, repeat business built on trust and shared values, not one-off bookings
Slow travel. Private. Purposeful.
Who We Are

Not just another travel agency

Bassa Travels is a boutique agency based in Spain, exclusively focused on Indonesia. We don't open group tours. We don't sell packaged itineraries. We design private experiences from scratch — crafted around each traveller's pace, taste, and purpose.

Our philosophy is simple: fewer clients, better trips. Every traveller who books with us receives personalised attention, carefully selected accommodation, and end-to-end support in Spanish — before, during, and after their journey.

We operate in the premium slow luxury segment: couples, honeymooners, and families who are ready to invest in a truly transformative experience in Indonesia.

Personalised Luxury
100% bespoke itineraries, built around each client's rhythm and style.
Slow Luxury
Rest, spa rituals, local ceremonies, and slow-paced immersion.
Private & Exclusive
No mass tours. No shared buses. Fully private, always.
Spanish-Speaking
Full support in Spanish — a rare offering for Indonesia-bound travellers.

Our traveller
profile

Understanding who we send helps you understand the quality of each partnership.

01
Demographics

Spanish-speaking adults, primarily from Spain and Latin America. Ages 30–60. High purchasing power, experienced travellers who have already "done" the usual destinations.

02
Travel Style

They seek privacy, calm, and authenticity. Slow itineraries. Quality over quantity. Willing to spend significantly for exceptional experiences that feel personal and curated.

03
Spend Profile

Premium segment. Mid-to-high-end villas and boutique hotels, private transfers, private guides, exclusive experiences. Average stays of 10–21 nights in Indonesia.

04
Motivation

Slow luxury, nature, culture and meaningful connection. They come to Indonesia intentionally — not by chance. They return home as advocates for the destination.

Working Together

What a collaboration
could look like

We are open to building a genuine, long-term relationship with institutions that share our vision: making Indonesia the go-to slow luxury destination for the Spanish traveller.

🏛️

Official Recognition

Being recognised as a preferred specialist agency by Indonesia's tourism office in Spain — a signal of quality and alignment with the country's national tourism strategy.

🎪

Joint Presence at Travel Fairs

Co-presence at key international tourism fairs — FITUR, ITB, WTM and others — representing Indonesia's premium slow luxury offering directly to the Spanish and European market's most qualified buyers and media.

📡

Destination Visibility

Indonesia featured as Bassa's exclusive destination across all channels — website, social media, client communications — reaching a high-intent Spanish audience actively planning a premium trip.

📊

Market Intelligence

Regular insights on Spanish demand, traveller profiles, and booking patterns — direct data from a specialist operating in this specific segment, unavailable through standard tourism analytics.

📁

Access to Official Materials

Tourism board resources, destination content, and promotional campaigns that we can adapt and distribute for the Spanish-speaking market with full cultural and institutional authenticity.

🌏

A Long-Term Commitment

We are not looking for a one-off interaction. We want to grow alongside Indonesia's tourism ambitions — contributing to a sustained, high-quality flow of Spanish travellers who respect and value the destination.

Open to Collaboration

Promoting Indonesia
to Spain's most discerning travellers

Bassa Travels is actively building institutional relationships with embassies, tourism boards and ministries committed to growing the premium Spanish market for Indonesia.

We are a focused, specialist agency — and we are building something lasting. If you represent Indonesia's tourism interests in Spain or Europe, we would be delighted to explore how we can work together.
